chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill not abcd and PretaxAmount> 0 and sls | select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",round(di[3]*100-100,3) as percent from(select compare(fee, 86400) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill not abcd and PretaxAmount> 0 and sls | select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",round(di[3]*100-100,3) as percent from(select compare(fee, 86400) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill  and  ProductCode:sls| select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",di[3]*100-100 as percent from(select compare(fee, 2592000) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill  and  ProductCode:sls| select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",di[3]*100-100 as percent from(select compare(fee, 2592000) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))

search.query: source:instance_bill and productcode:sls and  (BillingItem:"存储空间" or billingItem:storage)  |select round(max_by(usage,t),3) as "用量" from( select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage) as usage ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by t )
search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill and productcode:sls and BillingItem:"存储空间" |select concat(cast(round(sum(usage),3) as varchar),'GB') as "用量" from( select instanceid, max_by(Usage,__time__) as usage  from log group by instanceid )

search.query:
source:instance_bill and productcode:sls |select Project as Logstore,concat(cast(round(diff1[1],3) as varchar),'(GB)') as "索引流量",concat(cast(round(diffindexPack[1],3) as varchar),'(GB)') as "索引流量(资源包抵扣)",concat(cast(round(diff2[1],3)as varchar) ,' (GB*day)') as "最新存储空间",concat(cast(round(diffStorPack[1],3)as varchar) ,' (GB*day)') as "存储空间(资源包抵扣)",round(diff3[1],3) as "费用",concat(cast(round(diff3[3]*100-100,3) as varchar),'%') as "同比上月" from(  select project, compare(indexUsage,2592000) as diff1, compare(storageusage,2592000) as diff2 ,compare("费用",2592000) as diff3, compare(indexUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffindexPack, compare(storageUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffStorPack  from(select project, sum("费用")  as "费用",sum(indexUsage) as indexUsage, sum(indexUsagePackge) as indexUsagePackge, max_by(storageUsage,__time__) as storageUsage, max_by(storageUsagePackge,__time__) as storageUsagePackge from( select  array_join(slice(split(InstanceId,';'),2,2),',')   as project ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as "费用" ,sum(case when billingitem ='Index Size' or billingItem='索引流量' or billingItem='索引流量-时序索引' then Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024  else 0 end) as indexUsage,sum(case when billingitem ='Index Size' or billingItem='索引流量' or billingItem='索引流量-时序索引' then  DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024  else 0 end) as indexUsagePackge,sum(case when
  billingitem ='Storage' or billingItem='存储空间' or billingItem='存储空间-时序存储' then Usage+ DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024  else 0 end) as storageUsage,sum(case when
 billingitem ='Storage' or billingItem='存储空间' or billingItem='存储空间-时序存储' then  DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024  else 0 end) as storageUsagePackge,__time__  from log group by project ,__time__  )group by project) group by project) order by  "费用" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: 产品Code:  sls | select  "实例ID" as id , sum("应付金额") as fee group by id order by  fee desc limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: source:bill and productcode:sls | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d')  as "日期",   round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" group by "日期" order by "日期"   limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: source:bill and productcode:sls | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d')  as "日期",   round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" group by "日期" order by "日期"   limit 1000

search.query: source:bill and productcode:sls | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d')  as "日期",   round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" group by "日期" order by "日期"   limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: 产品Code:  sls | select date_trunc('day',__time__)  as "日期",   sum("应付金额") as "费用" group by "日期" order by "日期"   limit 1000

search.query:
source:instance_bill and productcode:sls |select Project,concat(cast(round(diff1[1],3) as varchar),'(GB)') as "索引流量",concat(cast(round(diffindexPack[1],3) as varchar),'(GB)') as "索引流量(资源包抵扣)",concat(cast(round(diff2[1],3)as varchar) ,' (GB*day)') as "最新存储空间",concat(cast(round(diffStorPack[1],3)as varchar) ,' (GB*day)') as "存储空间(资源包抵扣)",round(diff3[1],3) as "费用",concat(cast(round(diff3[3]*100-100,3) as varchar),'%') as "同比上月" from(  select project, compare(indexUsage,2592000) as diff1, compare(storageusage,2592000) as diff2 ,compare("费用",2592000) as diff3, compare(indexUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffindexPack, compare(storageUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffStorPack  from(select project, sum("费用")  as "费用",sum(indexUsage) as indexUsage, sum(indexUsagePackge) as indexUsagePackge, max_by(storageUsage,__time__) as storageUsage, max_by(storageUsagePackge,__time__) as storageUsagePackge from( select  split_part(InstanceId,';',2)  as project ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as "费用" ,sum(case when billingitem ='Index Size' or billingItem='索引流量' or billingItem='索引流量-时序索引' then Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024 else 0 end) as indexUsage,sum(case when billingitem ='Index Size' or billingItem='索引流量' or billingItem='索引流量-时序索引' then  DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024 else 0 end) as indexUsagePackge,sum(case when
 billingitem ='Storage' or billingItem='存储空间' or billingItem='存储空间-时序存储' then Usage+ DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024 else 0 end) as storageUsage,sum(case when
 billingitem ='Storage' or billingItem='存储空间' or billingItem='存储空间-时序存储' then  DeductedByResourcePackage/1024./1024/1024 else 0 end) as storageUsagePackge,__time__  from log group by project ,__time__  )group by project) group by project) order by  "费用" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: 产品Code:  sls | select  split_part("实例ID",';',2)  as project ,  round(sum("应付金额"),3)  as "费用" group by project order by  "费用" desc limit 1000

display.displayName: 计费项用量和单位(资源包抵扣后)

search.query: source:instance_bill and productcode:sls | select  "计费项"  , concat(cast("用量" as varchar),"用量单位") as "用量" , "费用" from(select  BillingItem   "计费项"  , arbitrary(UsageUnit)"用量单位",round(sum(Usage),3) as "用量",  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from log  group by  "计费项"  order by  "费用" desc limit 1000)
search.tokenQuery: 产品Code:  sls | select  "计费项"  , concat(cast("用量" as varchar),"用量单位") as "用量" , "费用" from(select  "计费项"  , arbitrary("用量单位")"用量单位",round(sum("用量"),3) as "用量",  round(sum("应付金额"),3) as "费用" from log  group by  "计费项"  order by  "费用" desc limit 1000)

search.query: source:instance_bill and productcode:sls and  (BillingItem:"存储空间" or billingItem:storage) | select   t,  concat(cast("用量" as varchar),"用量单位") as "用量",concat(cast("资源包抵扣" as varchar),"用量单位") as "资源包抵扣" , "费用" from(select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as t,   arbitrary(UsageUnit)"用量单位",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "用量",  round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "资源包抵扣", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from log  group by  t   order by  t    )limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: 产品Code:  sls and 计费项:存储空间 | select   t,  concat(cast("用量" as varchar),"用量单位") as "用量" , "费用" from(select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as t,   arbitrary("用量单位")"用量单位",round(sum("用量"),3) as "用量",  round(sum("应付金额"),3) as "费用" from log  group by  t   order by  "费用" desc )limit 1000

search.query: source:instance_bill and productcode:sls and  ( BillingItem:"读写次数" or BillingItem:"Read Write Count") |source:instance_bill and productcode:sls and BillingItem:"读写流量" | select t, concat(cast("用量" as varchar),'百万次') as "用量",concat(cast("资源包抵扣" as varchar),"用量单位") as "资源包抵扣" , "费用" from(select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as t, arbitrary(UsageUnit)"用量单位",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "用量", round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1000/1000),3) as "资源包抵扣", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "费用" from log group by t order by t )limit 1000
